A

actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class UserInterface
Dispatches button clicks as canned commands, or reads the text field on Enter.
addItem(String, Item) - Method in class ItemList
Adds or replaces an item under the given key.
addItem(String, Item) - Method in class Player
Adds (or replaces) an item in the player's inventory.
addItem(String, Item) - Method in class Room
Places (or replaces) an item in this room under the given key.
allAssetsCached() - Method in class AssetManager
Checks whether all assets are already present in the local folder.
AssetManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Downloads game assets from the ESIEE web server and stores them locally.
AssetManager() - Constructor for class AssetManager
Creates a new asset manager.

B

back - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Returns to the previous room, when possible.

C

canGoBack() - Method in class Player
Indicates whether the player can go back to a previous room.
cashin - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Exchanges certain items for money.
Command - Class in Unnamed Package
Immutable pair of tokens representing one player command.
Command(String, String) - Constructor for class Command
Creates a command.
CommandWord - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
Enumerates the command words recognized by the game.
CommandWords - Class in Unnamed Package
Maintains the fixed vocabulary of primary commands understood by the Parser.
CommandWords() - Constructor for class CommandWords
Creates a CommandWords object containing all valid commands.
countMissingAssets() - Method in class AssetManager
Returns the total number of assets that need to be downloaded.

D

downloadAssets() - Method in class AssetManager
Downloads all missing assets from the assets url.
drop - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Drops an item from the player's inventory into the room.

E

enable(boolean) - Method in class UserInterface
Enables or disables keyboard entry in the command field and toggles caret blink.

G

Game - Class in Unnamed Package
Application entry point for the Zuul-style Pokémon adventure game.
Game() - Constructor for class Game
Constructs the game by creating the engine and GUI, then linking them.
GameEngine - Class in Unnamed Package
Central coordinator for game state, room navigation, and command handling.
GameEngine() - Constructor for class GameEngine
Builds the default map and creates the command parser.
getCommand(String) - Method in class Parser
Tokenizes pInputLine and builds the corresponding Command.
getCommandList() - Method in class CommandWords
Builds a single string listing every valid command, separated by spaces.
getCommandString() - Method in class Parser
Returns a space-separated list of all valid command words.
getCommandWord() - Method in class Command
Returns the command word (first token).
getCurrentFile() - Method in class AssetManager
Returns the name of the most recent file processed by AssetManager.downloadAssets().
getCurrentProgress() - Method in class AssetManager
Returns the 1-based index of the most recent asset processed by AssetManager.downloadAssets().
getCurrentRoom() - Method in class Player
Returns the player's current room.
getDescription() - Method in class Room
Returns the short description supplied at construction time.
getErrorMessage() - Method in class AssetManager
Returns a human-readable error message when at least one download failed.
getExit(String) - Method in class Room
Looks up the neighboring room reachable via pDirection.
getExitString() - Method in class Room
Formats all exit directions as a single line.
getImageName() - Method in class Room
Returns the image resource path associated with this room.
getItem(String) - Method in class ItemList
Returns the item associated with the given name, or null.
getItem(String) - Method in class Player
Retrieves an item from the player's inventory.
getItem(String) - Method in class Room
Retrieves an item currently stored in the room.
getItemDescription() - Method in class Item
Builds a short multi-line summary combining description and price.
getItemInventory() - Method in class Player
Returns a human-readable inventory summary.
getItemList() - Method in class ItemList
Builds an inventory summary listing all item keys and the total value.
getItemPrice() - Method in class Item
Returns the numeric price associated with this item.
getItemsDescription() - Method in class ItemList
Builds a multi-line string with each item's description, or a default notice when the list is empty.
getLongDescription() - Method in class Room
Composes the room description, exit list, and either item lines or a default notice.
getMapImageName() - Method in class Room
Returns the map image resource path associated with this room.
getMoney() - Method in class Player
Returns the player's current money balance.
getName() - Method in class Player
Returns the player name.
getPreviousRoom() - Method in class Player
Returns the previous room.
getProgressBar() - Method in class UserInterface
Returns the current value of the progress bar.
getSecondWord() - Method in class Command
Returns the second word of this command, if any.
getTotalAssets() - Method in class AssetManager
Returns the total number of assets configured for download.
go - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Moves the player to an adjacent room.
goBack() - Method in class Player
Moves back to the previous room.

H

hasSecondWord() - Method in class Command
Indicates whether a second token was present.
help - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Prints help text and the list of available commands.

I

interpretCommand(String) - Method in class GameEngine
Parses and executes one player command line.
inventory - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Prints the player's inventory.
isCommand(String) - Method in class CommandWords
Tests membership of pString in the internal command table (case-sensitive).
isComplete() - Method in class AssetManager
Indicates whether the asset download phase has completed.
isEmpty() - Method in class ItemList
Checks whether this item list contains no elements.
isExit(Room) - Method in class Room
Checks if a room is an exit from this room.
isUnknown() - Method in class Command
Indicates whether the parser recognized the command word.
isWinningRoom() - Method in class Room
Indicates whether this room is flagged as a winning room.
Item - Class in Unnamed Package
Describes a collectible or scenery object with a textual blurb and an arbitrary weight or price value surfaced to the player.
Item(String, int) - Constructor for class Item
Stores the immutable description and numeric metadata for an item.
ItemList - Class in Unnamed Package
Stores a private collection of items keyed by name.
ItemList() - Constructor for class ItemList
Creates an empty item list.

L

LoadingScreen - Class in Unnamed Package
A splash screen displayed while the AssetManager downloads missing game assets from the remote server.
LoadingScreen(AssetManager) - Constructor for class LoadingScreen
Creates a new loading screen linked to the given asset manager.
look - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Reprints the current room description.

M

moveTo(Room) - Method in class Player
Changes the current room, saving the previous one to the history stack.

N

name - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Changes the player's displayed name.

P

Parser - Class in Unnamed Package
Turns a single input line into a Command for the adventure game.
Parser() - Constructor for class Parser
Prepares the internal CommandWords table used during parsing.
Player - Class in Unnamed Package
Stores the state that belongs to the player: identity, current position, history, and a personal item list.
Player(String, Room) - Constructor for class Player
Creates a player with a name and a starting room.
print(String) - Method in class UserInterface
Appends text to the log without a trailing newline and scrolls to the end.
println(String) - Method in class UserInterface
Appends a line of text to the log, then scrolls to the end.

Q

quit - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Quits the game.

R

removeItem(String) - Method in class ItemList
Removes the item associated with the given key.
removeItem(String) - Method in class Player
Removes an item from the player's inventory.
removeItem(String) - Method in class Room
Removes an item from this room's item list.
Room - Class in Unnamed Package
Models one location in the game world: narrative text, image, exits to other rooms, and a keyed collection of Items the player can examine.
Room(String, String, String) - Constructor for class Room
Creates a room with a description, image path, and empty exit/item maps.

S

setAsWinningRoom() - Method in class Room
Marks this room as a winning room.
setExit(String, Room) - Method in class Room
Registers a one-way exit from this room to pExit.
setGUI(UserInterface) - Method in class GameEngine
Attaches the user interface used for all player feedback.
setMoney(int) - Method in class Player
Sets the player's money balance.
setName(String) - Method in class Player
Sets the player name.
setProgress(int) - Method in class UserInterface
Updates the progress bar shown in the UI.
showImage(String) - Method in class UserInterface
Loads an image from the classpath (typically under images/) and sets it on the north label, packing the frame to fit.
showMap(String) - Method in class UserInterface
Loads an image from the classpath (typically under images/) and sets it on the map label.
startAndWait() - Method in class LoadingScreen
Shows the loading screen.

T

take - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Takes an item from the current room.
test - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Runs commands from a packaged test file.

U

UNKNOWN - Enum constant in enum class CommandWord
Fallback value used when the command word is not recognized.
UserInterface - Class in Unnamed Package
Swing-based graphical shell for the text adventure: log area, text field, directional shortcut buttons, and an optional room image.
UserInterface(GameEngine) - Constructor for class UserInterface
Builds the frame, layout, and listeners, storing the engine for later callbacks.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class CommandWord
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class CommandWord
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
